% check a.php
a.php:24:1: $x is of type: int (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:15:1: $x is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

% check c.php
c.php:36:1: $u is of type: User (DEBUG)
c.php:39:1: $v is of type: User (DEBUG)

% check d.php
d.php:19:1: $x is of type: int (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

/**
 * @template T
 */
class Foo
{
	private $val;

	/** @return T */
	public function find()
	{
		return $this->val;
	}
}

/** @extends Foo<int> */
class Bar extends Foo
{
}

$bar = new Bar;
$x = $bar->find();
#debugType $x
-- b.php --
<?php

class List
{
	/**
	 * @template T
	 * @param    iterator<T> $a
	 * @return   T
	 */
	function getFirst($a);
}

$l = new List;
$x = $l->getFirst($vals);
#debugType $x
-- c.php --
<?php

/**
 * @template T
 */
class BaseRepo
{
	/** @return Query<T> */
	public function query();
}

/**
 * @template T
 */
class Query
{
	/** @return T */
	public function find();
}

class User
{
}

/**
 * @extends BaseRepo<User>
 */
class UserRepo extends BaseRepo
{
	/** @return Query<User> */
	public function optimQuery();
}

$r = new UserRepo;
$u = $r->query()->find();
#debugType $u

$v = $r->optimQuery()->find();
#debugType $v
-- d.php --
<?php

/**
 * @template TItem
 */
class Collection
{
	/** @return TItem */
	public function first();
}

/** @extends Collection<int> */
class IntCollection extends Collection
{
}

$c = new IntCollection;
$x = $c->first();
#debugType $x
